content: next-intl 4.13.0 App Router setup requires: (1) src/i18n/routing.ts with defineRouting({locales:['en','tr'],defaultLocale:'en'}); (2) src/middleware.ts with createMiddleware(routing) + matcher excluding api/_next/_vercel/static; (3) src/i18n/request.ts with getRequestConfig async ({requestLocale}) => hasLocale validation + dynamic import messages/.json; (4) next.config.js wrapped with createNextIntlPlugin(); (5) ALL pages/layouts move into src/app/[locale]/; (6) [locale]/layout.tsx wraps children with NextIntlClientProvider and sets <html lang={locale}>; (7) setRequestLocale(locale) in every page+layout for static rendering; (8) generateStaticParams returns routing.locales.map(l=>({locale:l}))
